description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a predominantly black exterior accented by metallic and bronze elements. The body is angular and modern, with a prominent rail system on top for mounting accessories. The stock is compact and integrated into the rear, while the grip is ergonomic and contoured for secure handling. The barrel is thick and enclosed, with a short, wide muzzle, suggesting a high-capacity, close-quarters weapon. Visible mechanical details include a trigger guard, a magazine or loading port beneath the action, and a pump mechanism under the barrel. The overall construction appears solid and functional, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a black and bronze finish, featuring a rail system, ergonomic grip, and pump-action mechanism. Its compact, robust build is designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, circular muzzle and the compact, solid stock at the rear.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rail system, pump mechanism, and ergonomic grip, with visible mechanical details along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the integrated stock and the alignment of the barrel and action, with the grip and trigger guard visible below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pump mechanism, trigger guard, and additional mechanical features, mirroring the details of view 1.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, thick and enclosed with a short, wide muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a reinforced, contoured shape
